seed.description: ONE conversation that requires creating ONE of each job type (one_off, scheduled, ongoing). Tests whether the agent correctly discriminates between the three types based on conversational signals (specific date = one_off, recurring on cadence = scheduled, work-until-condition = ongoing) AND can hold all three intents in a single dialogue without confusing them.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Helping me plan around a hire. Timezone Europe/London.

We just made an offer to a senior PM candidate, Maya Patel (user_id user_maya_pm). She has 14 days to respond. Until she either accepts or declines, can you check in on her status every other day and prompt me if I need to nudge her?
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Ongoing follow-up every 2 days on Maya's offer status, until she accepts or declines.

signal_annotation.notes: ONGOING — clear end_condition (accepts/declines), interval_seconds=172800. related_entity_id=user_maya_pm (the candidate).

dialogue_rounds.user_message: If she accepts, her start date is January 15, 2027. Remind me on January 8, 2027 at 10am to prepare onboarding materials — I always forget to do prep early enough.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Reminder set for January 8, 2027 at 10am: prepare onboarding for Maya.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Also: while we're hiring, every Monday at 8am, give me a recruiting pipeline summary. This becomes our regular Monday rhythm.
Walk me through what you set up — and confirm the type of each.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: PROBE — agent should list 3 jobs and correctly identify their types.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Quick aside — what's a typical onboarding timeline length for a senior PM?
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Typically 30-90 days, with structured weeks for ramp, shadowing, ownership.

signal_annotation.notes: Negative — generic Q&A, no scheduling intent.

qa_items.question: What jobs have I set up around the Maya hire?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Three: ongoing follow-up on her offer status (every 2 days until accept/decline), a one-off reminder Jan 8 2027 to prep onboarding, and a recurring Monday 8am recruiting pipeline summary.

qa_items.question: Is the Maya follow-up a one-time reminder or an ongoing task?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Ongoing — it runs until she accepts or declines.

qa_items.question: When is the onboarding prep reminder?
